privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic property loss report document. All claim data (claim number 778492, insured name Robert & Sarah Miller, carrier Apex Mutual Insurance, address 2409 Oak Creek Dr Austin TX 78704) is generated synthetically by the setup script in claim_data.json. Three synthetic JPEG images (640x480px) are generated using PIL. The output document is expected at /home/ga/Documents/Claim_778492_Report.odt with minimum file size significantly exceeding 20KB due to embedded images. The document must include claim details, a table with repair items and grand total of $1,443.90, three inserted photos with captions, and four sections formatted with Heading 1 style.
